ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #7, Report, Fees
Off Calendar May-26-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi, via ZOOM, counsel for Thomas Lucas, via ZOOM, Trustee.

At the outset, counsel and the court discuss the amount of fees being requested by Mr. Lucas. Both counsel and Mr. Lucas report that Ms. Corcoran has required a lot of assistance, especially during the pandemic. The court then queries counsel whether there have been any efforts made to contact the Department of Public Health of the City and County of San Francisco to help assist with Ms. Corcoran's needs. Mr. Lucas reports that he has made attempts to contact the Department of Public Health but has not been able to find assistance.

After additional discussion, the Seventh Account and Report of Trustee is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

Off Calendar Dec-26-2007 Continued To Jan-07-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES ATTY. AVID ELI ALAVI FOR THE PETITIONER THOMAS LUCAS;
MARY CORCORAN, (PRINCIPAL) PRO PER;

THE COURT INQUIRED ABOUT THE ISSUES RAISED BY THE EXAMINER. MS. ALAVI INFORMED THE COURT THAT THE PROBATE CODE SECTIONS BEING ADDRESSED IN THE EXAMINER'S NOTE ARE ALREADY IN THE COURT RECORDS. SHE FURTHER STATED THAT THE DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH SERVICES HAS ACKNOWLEDGED RECEIPT OF THE SPECIAL NEEDS TRUST. SHE INFORMED THE COURT THAT THE APPROPRIATE BOND IS IN THE AMOUNT OF $242,000.00. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO JANUARY 7, 2008 FOR PROOF OF DISABLITY, TO SUBMIT A NEW ORDER, BOND WITH THE CORRECT AMOUNT AND TO SUBMIT THE SPECIAL NEEDS TRUST IN 2008 FORM.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Clerk: Cynthia Herbert. Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto, CSR #5229 Bailiff: Deputy Cruz
